notes: AllocateSmartly 'Aggressive / Adaptive Asset Allocation' (Butler, Philbrick, Gordillo & Varadi — ReSolve/GestaltU, SSRN 2328254). Canary-gated cross-sectional momentum rotation with MINIMUM-VARIANCE weighting. Each monthly rebalance: (1) CANARY RISK GATE — evaluate the canary asset's absolute 126-day momentum; canary momentum > 0 => RISK-ON, else RISK-OFF; this is the AAA 'aggressive' crash switch that pulls the whole book out of the offensive universe into the defensive sleeve. (2) RISK-ON => rank the offensive universe by 126-day total return, select the top-N (default 5), weight by minimum-variance. (3) RISK-OFF => the whole book rotates into the single defensive sleeve at full weight. Lookbacks are FIXED (126D momentum + correlation, 20D volatility) — no ML, no adaptive parameters.

EA runs one instance per host symbol. Each instance reads the full universe's D1 closes (via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory) to compute the canary gate and the cross-sectional momentum/vol/correlation states, then goes long the host ONLY when the host is an allocated slot this month (a positive-momentum top-N offensive sleeve when risk-on, or the defensive sleeve when risk-off). One position per magic on the host; long-only (the source rotates into the defensive asset / cash, never shorts).

MINIMUM-VARIANCE realization (deterministic, NO matrix inversion, NO ML — per build brief): the source's min-variance QP over a 126-day correlation / 20-day volatility covariance matrix is realized as an INVERSE-VOLATILITY tilt combined with a LOW-CORRELATION tilt — the two properties a true min-var solution rewards. raw_w[i] = (1/vol20[i]) * (1/(1+avg_corr126[i])), normalized across the selected top-N so weights sum to 1, then bounded to [w_min=0.05, w_max=0.60] and renormalized. The host's lot is scaled by its min-var weight via RISK_FIXED (effective risk = RISK_FIXED * PORTFOLIO_WEIGHT * host_weight, re-armed through QM_RiskSizerConfigure at entry). Bounded, no martingale, no PnL feedback.

ETF -> DWX CFD ports (ETFs are not tradeable on Darwinex; nearest liquid proxies, all matrix-verified in framework/registry/dwx_symbol_matrix.csv). OFFENSIVE rotation pool: SP500.DWX <- US large-cap (SPY, BACKTEST-ONLY read member, not broker-routable for live); NDX.DWX <- growth / EM proxy (QQQ/EEM/EWJ); WS30.DWX <- US large-cap value (DIA); GDAXI.DWX <- EAFE/European equity (EZU/EWJ); UK100.DWX <- international equity / REIT proxy (VNQ/RWX); XAUUSD.DWX <- gold / real-asset (GLD); XTIUSD.DWX <- broad commodity (DBC).

FLAGGED ports (no DWX bond CFD exists): DEFENSIVE sleeve <- XAUUSD.DWX gold proxy for the source's bond safe leg (IEF/TLT) — FLAG: nearest available real-asset/safe proxy, a true Treasury CFD does not exist on DWX. CANARY asset <- SP500.DWX, the representative offensive risk bellwether — FLAG: the source's canary set (EEM / aggregate-bond) is approximated by the broad US-equity proxy; the canary is realized as the offensive-universe bellwether, not a dedicated bond canary.

Monthly logic is D1-native (the .DWX tester yields 0 bars on MN1). Rebalance fires on the first new D1 bar of a new broker-time month (QM_IsRebalanceBar tracks month/year). Lookbacks use a 21-trading-day-per-month proxy: 126 D1 bars momentum/correlation, 20 D1 bars volatility.

Slot mapping (magic = 1281*10000 + slot): SP500.DWX slot 0, NDX.DWX slot 1, WS30.DWX slot 2, GDAXI.DWX slot 3, UK100.DWX slot 4, XAUUSD.DWX slot 5, XTIUSD.DWX slot 6. Codex assigns the canonical slots when registering magic_numbers.csv. XAUUSD.DWX is BOTH an offensive rotation member (slot 5) and the risk-off defensive sleeve; SP500.DWX is BOTH an offensive member (slot 0) and the canary.
